parameters.query: SELECT DISTINCT l.user_id FROM packaging.landscape l WHERE l.snapshot_date >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days');

SELECT DISTINCT ON (l.company_id)
  l.company_id, l.company_name, l.tier_structure, l.value_metric,
  l.gating_strategy, l.plan_count, l.has_free_tier, l.has_enterprise,
  l.snapshot_date
FROM packaging.landscape l
WHERE l.user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid
ORDER BY l.company_id, l.snapshot_date DESC;

SELECT b.company_name, b.change_type, b.strategic_interpretation, b.severity, b.created_at
FROM packaging.briefs b
WHERE b.user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid
  AND b.created_at >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days')
ORDER BY b.created_at DESC;

INSERT INTO packaging.audits (user_id, quarter, title, content_json, content_md, strengths, vulnerabilities, opportunities, threats)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $json.quarter }}',
  '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.content_json }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.content_md.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.strengths }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.vulnerabilities }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.opportunities }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.threats }}'::jsonb
)
ON CONFLICT (user_id, quarter) DO UPDATE SET
  title = EXCLUDED.title,
  content_json = EXCLUDED.content_json,
  content_md = EXCLUDED.content_md,
  strengths = EXCLUDED.strengths,
  vulnerabilities = EXCLUDED.vulnerabilities,
  opportunities = EXCLUDED.opportunities,
  threats = EXCLUDED.threats;
